components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for main actions like booking rooms or confirming changes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3a9147; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 24px; font-weight: 600; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #2d7a3a; }

narrative.overview: D.O.R.M.S. utilizes a clean, modern, and high-contrast light design system. The system prioritizes functional efficiency, structured data displays, and high readability.

rules.name: The Green Rarity Rule
rules.body: The vibrant Mantis Green accent is used on ≤10% of any screen surface to draw immediate attention to statuses or active states.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: All containers and inputs are flat at rest. Depth shadows are applied only to floating cards, modals, or dropdowns to draw attention.

dos: Do maintain a consistent 10px corner radius on all interactive components.
Do ensure text overlays meet WCAG AA requirements.
donts: Don't use legacy table borders or tiny font sizes.
Don't nest cards within card panels.
